title: The Courage to Not Ship

ratings.notes: Strong structural discipline: evidence-first, named the loop (mock-for-mock), practical 3-step recommendation is concrete. 'Green dashboard inertia' is a useful coined term. Slight weakness: the 'what to do instead' section is a bit listicle — the final 3 bullets are mechanically correct but don't land as hard as the surrounding prose. Codex perspective adds good value on the inertia/checkpoint framing.

The ego investment paragraph is the strongest original contribution — it names the actual emotional cost, not just the analytical problem. 'Normalization of deviance' earns its use. The ending lands: 'the thing that keeps giving up from becoming the only option' is one of the sharper closing lines in the series. Final article synthesizes both drafts cleanly — the courage question framing (distrust your own dashboard) elevates above either draft individually.
